nasb.text: But as for you, Daniel, conceal these words and seal up the book until the end of time; many will go back and forth, and knowledge will increase.”

esv.text: But you, Daniel, shut up the words and seal the book, until the time of the end. Many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall increase.”

cnv.text: 但以理啊！你要隱藏這些話，把這書密封，直到末期，必有許多人來往奔跑，知識增多。”

ccb.text: 但以理啊，这些话要保密，要把这书封起来，直到末了。许多人必四处探究，因而知识必增多。”
